data.title: Visit Korean Heritage Campaign promotes events in NY with "Golden Blessings" theme, featuring Joseon Dynasty Bojagi and temple food. Feb 11-14.
data.description: The Visit Korean Heritage Campaign has initiated promotional activities in New York with the theme "Golden Blessings." The events will showcase media art displaying the Joseon Dynasty Royal Bojagi and offer immersive Korean temple food experiences. The campaign features a variety of heritage programs and will take place from February 11 to 14. This initiative was launched in Seoul, South Korea, on January 29, 2026, aiming to showcase the country's rich cultural heritage through engaging activities.

data.title: Law.com introduces AI-enhanced Scholar digital library & revamped Scholar Store for faster legal research. Announcement made in New York on Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: Law.com introduced enhanced AI functionalities from Scholar Answers and an updated ScholarStore to provide quicker and more efficient legal research solutions for lawyers and legal groups. The revamped Law.com Scholar digital library, unveiled on January 29, 2026 in New York, offers improved accessibility and speed in legal research.

data.title: Historic Union Station & LA Plaza de Cultura y Artes named official fan zone for LA World Cup 2026.
data.description: Los Los Angeles World Cup 2026 Host Committee has designated Historic Union Station, in collaboration with LA Plaza de Cultura y Artes, as a fan zone for the upcoming event. This announcement was made on January 29, 2026. This initiative is part of a larger region-wide celebration for the event.

data.title: Franchise Direct UK released report on UK franchise market trends, focusing on growth and strategic insights.
data.description: In Dublin on January 29, 2026, Franchise Direct UK unveiled its newest publication "Growth and Trends in the UK Franchise Market." The guide delves into the UK franchise market, analyzing the franchise model, recent shifts in franchise expansion, and strategic perspectives. This resource serves as a valuable tool for understanding the current landscape of the UK franchise market.

data.title: Emergency Nurses Association establishes first int'l affiliate with UAE Emergency Nurses Advisory Council for education and connections. Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: UAE's Emergency Nurses Advisory Council is set to provide crucial education and professional networking opportunities. This marks a significant milestone as the Emergency Nurses Association has launched its inaugural global counterpart. The UAE Emergency Nurses Advisory Council will focus on delivering valuable resources and connections to professionals in the field. The announcement was made in Schaumburg, Illinois on January 29, 2026. This move aims to strengthen the sector globally, benefiting a large number of nurses involved in emergency care.

data.title: Weedmaps partners with Record Breakers event in Mesa, AZ on Jan 31, 2026 - featuring elite athletes, world-record attempts, and live music.
data.description: Weedmaps, a top cannabis marketplace and discovery platform, is rekindling its ties to action sports by teaming up with Record Breakers, an extraordinary extreme sports event happening at Revel Surf Park in Mesa, Arizona, on January 31, 2026. This full-day festival will bring together premier athletes, daring world-record tries, live music, and numerous fans for a one-of-a-kind blend of excitement, culture, and performance centered on recovery. The event will feature various world-record attempts.

data.title: Hightouch named leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Data Platforms based on criteria evaluating vision and execution.
data.description: In San Francisco, Hightouch has achieved the status of a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Data Platforms. The assessment conducted by Gartner reviewed key criteria focusing on Hightouch's comprehensive vision and operational capabilities. Hightouch's innovative platform, designed for data warehouses, such as Snowflake and Databricks, facilitates organizations in utilizing customer data without the need for data duplication or specialized engineering.

data.title: Dow rises as Microsoft drops on earnings, Meta and Tesla rally. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase while Microsoft witnessed a significant drop in earnings. Concurrently, there was a surge in the stock value of Meta and Tesla during morning trading. The stock market saw a mixed performance with the Dow Jones index gaining while Meta and Tesla rallied. However, Microsoft and ServiceNow faced declines. This information was shared during live coverage and reflects the latest market trends and fluctuations.

data.title: CDC Foundation in Georgia partners with 18 rural community coalitions to prevent overdoses, funded by Georgia Opioid Crisis Abatement Trust.
data.description: Supported by the Georgia Opioid Crisis Abatement Trust, 18 rural community coalitions in Georgia are being funded. According to federal data, overdose deaths have been decreasing across the country for over two years. Despite this trend, Georgia's decline in overdose deaths is not as steep as the national average.

data.title: Leaf Agriculture introduces LeafLake, a data analysis product, revolutionizing agribusiness.
data.description: Leaf Agriculture unveiled a groundbreaking product called LeafLake on January 29, 2026. With this new offering, Leaf introduces advanced data analysis capabilities to its customers, enabling them to conduct intricate analysis on their Planted and Applied data. Through LeafLake, customers can effortlessly navigate through comprehensive data sets, enhancing their overall experience with Leaf's services.
KALLAS SAYS THERE'S PROPOSAL FOR SCHENGEN BAN ON RUSSIA EX-FIGHTERS

data.title: Corning surpasses Q4 forecasts with $4.412 billion revenue, driven by AI-fueled optical business surge. Earnings reported at 72 cents per share.
data.description: Corning Inc. (NYSE: GLW) exceeded expectations in their fourth-quarter results, with revenue totaling $4.412 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $4.365 billion. The company's strong performance was attributed to high demand in Optical Communications from AI products, solid Specialty Materials results, and a steady Display sector. Analyst Samik Chatterjee from JPMorgan, who has given Corning an Overweight rating and set a price target of $115, noted that despite lower-than-expected gross margins due to challenges in Solar, the company still achieved earnings of 72 cents per share. These positive results have led to a promising first-quarter forecast hinting at a growth acceleration in revenue. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Renew Biotechnologies partners with Path Fertility to provide NOA Guide epigenetic diagnostic test for men; helps in surgical decisions.
data.description: Today, in Pleasant Grove, Utah, Renew Biotechnologies revealed its involvement as the clinical testing provider for Path Fertility's NOA Guide. The NOA Guide is an epigenetic diagnostic test created to assist in surgical decision-making for males with non-obstructive conditions. This new test aims to provide crucial information to aid in medical procedures, and it marks a significant advancement in the field.

data.title: Wolfspeed launches new TOLT portfolio to meet AI datacenter demand, improves power density and thermal performance.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, Wolfspeed has revealed its latest TOLT portfolio to meet the growing demand in AI datacenters. This new TOLT (TO-Leaded, Top-Side Cooled) package, utilizing Wolfspeed’s Gen 4 MOSFET technology, offers enhanced power density and thermal performance. Specifically designed to cater to the rising power and cooling requirements of AI and hyperscale datacenters, TOLT brings innovation with its capabilities.

data.title: Lee Enterprises to hold webcast on Feb 10, 2026, for Q4 results ended Dec 28, 2025. Operating in 72 markets. (Words: 98)
data.description: Lee Enterprises, Incorporated (NASDAQ: LEE), a key player in the subscription and advertising sector as well as a top supplier of reliable local news and information across 72 markets, is set to host an audio webcast and conference call on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, starting at 9 a.m. CT. On the agenda is the preliminary results for the quarter concluding on December 28, 2025, with a news release expected before the market opens on the same day.

data.title: Fintech pioneer Adam E. Gordon joins Membrane Labs as Strategic Advisor; largest shareholder, institutional digital asset management platform.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 29, 2026, it was announced that Adam E. Gordon, a leading figure in the fintech industry and a significant shareholder in Membrane Labs, will be taking on the role of Strategic Advisor to the CEO and Executive Team. Membrane Labs, a prominent institutional digital asset management platform, shared the news of Gordon's appointment to the company.
The US to sell $77 bln in 6-Month bills on February 2nd, to settle on February 5th.

data.title: GLCU and Takara introduce DREAM to address mortgage lock-in effect, benefiting members and housing market.
data.description: Great Lakes Credit Union (GLCU) in Bannockburn, Ill., and Takara in New York have partnered to introduce DREAM (Discount for Real Estate Affordability and Mobility) to tackle a critical issue in the housing and mortgage sectors. The initiative aims to combat the mortgage lock-in effect that has impacted numerous Americans, with millions constrained by low-rate mortgages that hinder their mobility, limit housing inventory, and affect financial stability. DREAM provides a straightforward remedy by offering members a discount to address this issue.
